utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , okay , here she comes ! How do I look ? Do I look like a guy who does not want to get married ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ! And also , a little like a French guy . I never noticed that before .

emotion_cause.span: 2_a little like a French guy . I never noticed that before .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , just hanging out , talkin about uh , websites .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , we saw this really interesting website about marriage and how totally unnecessary it is and how its just a way for the government to keep tabs on you .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well that is a little crazy . Although I am you know glad to hear that you are branching out on what you look at on the Internet .

emotion_cause.span: 9_you are branching out on what you look at on the Internet .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , well ... You know , it just got me thinking though , why would anybody ever want to get married huh ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why ? ! To celebrate your relationship ! To solidify your commitment ! To declare your love for one another to the world !

emotion_cause.span: 10_why would anybody ever want to get married huh ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay well that is good to know .
